title: Napkin Rings Set of 6 Gold Napkin Rings Snowflake Reindeer Christmas Lunch Party Tableware Christmas Decorations Napkin Holder
features: Set of 6 gold Christmas napkin rings.
This napkin ring is an great addition to any Christmas collection, made from zinc alloy and featuring a snowflake and reindeer design, a perfect finish to any festive table setting.
Each ring has a diameter of approx. 4cm, perfect for a range of napkins or serviettes, adding a bit of festive class to your Christmas table setting.
Whether is a festive family lunch, a dinner date with friends, a seasonal wedding, or a classic pub dinner, the napkin rings will bring elegance to your table.
description: Set of 6 gold Christmas napkin rings.
